items.title: Update TypeScript ESLint Parser to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @typescript-eslint/parser from version 8.57.2 to 8.58.0. Key improvements include support for TypeScript 6 and several bug fixes in the ESLint plugin, enhancing overall linting performance and stability.

items.title: Update highlight.js to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps highlight.js from version 11.7.0 to 11.11.1, addressing a regression with Rust grammar and enhancing emoji support in single quote strings. The changes improve syntax highlighting capabilities and ensure better compatibility with recent language features.

items.title: Upgrade xterm addon to version 0.11.0 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @xterm/addon-fit package from version 0.10.0 to 0.11.0, enhancing compatibility and performance. Key changes include a revamped attach addon and improved documentation for methods and events. This upgrade ensures a smoother user experience in terminal interactions.
